source_note: Full-resolution Planet-Fusion surface-reflectance rasters (1024x1024x4 int16, B/G/R/NIR, 3 m) read in-memory from per-zone planet.<UTM>.zip; the ~525 GB raw TUM mirror excluded in sec:data, cherry-picked via rsync include/exclude.
cv_protocol: 5-seed stratified AOI-level hold-out (split on real cube id to prevent leakage, stratified by dominant change class)
provenance: src/cross_validate.py over src/train_v2.py + src/evaluate_v2.py (GBDA26_project_11). fold_macro holds the per-seed test mAP from a fresh re-run; mean/std/min/max are computed from those values.

variants.color_note: Planet bands (3,2,1) = NIR-Red-Green false colour, equivalent to nrg elsewhere

variants.class_weight_note: agri x3.3 / wetland x6.25 / snow x3.6
